evidence_quotes.quote: players themselves hosting servers for multiplayer games, for example
private servers of Maple Story (an online game) here in Taiwan.

paragraphs.text: A great initiative. Unlike some would believe, this is not forcing the developers to support the game indefinitely, only asking them to make it possible for customers to run the games by themsleves (players themselves hosting servers for multiplayer games, for example) after official support have ended. This has been proven to be possible and not unreasonable to do, as seen by multiple paid private servers of Maple Story (an online game) here in Taiwan. These don't require any effort from the original developer, and enable players to play the game without relying on the original developer or their servers.
